history.qwen_observation: SpringFox dependencies were removed or became incompatible during the Spring Boot 2.7 upgrade, causing compilation failures for springfox.documentation.* imports.
history.qwen_rationale: Migrating to SpringDoc before upgrading Spring Boot removes the abandoned SpringFox dependency and rewrites its usages, preventing compilation failures during the SB 2.7 and 3.3 upgrades. The chain follows the standard JDK 11→21 progression with the SpringFox→SpringDoc migration inserted early to resolve the immediate build failure.

history.qwen_observation: The SpringFoxToSpringDoc recipe removed the SpringFox dependency but left behind configuration code importing springfox packages, causing a compilation failure at JDK 11.
history.qwen_rationale: Per the observation library, the SpringFox-to-SpringDoc migration must run at JDK 17 immediately before the Spring Boot 3.3 upgrade. This ensures the project compiles cleanly under SB 2.7 at JDK 11, transitions to JDK 17, replaces the abandoned SpringFox dependency with SpringDoc, and then safely applies the namespace-breaking SB 3.x migration.
